title: JusticeX Page Content Model (v2 — reconciled to the 44-surface hierarchy + Tailored Value Propositions v2, 2026-07-16)
description: One record = one surface. The SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for a surface's message. Claude authors it, then derives the Gemini Notebook / Higgsfield / avatar briefs from it, and the site renders it into the LOCKED Families skeleton. RECONCILED: uses the canonical three-door taxonomy (Markets · Channels · Solutions) with three-tier context inheritance, the canonical value-prop structure (Lead → Substance → Tier-2 frame → Master promise → The ask), per-surface coverage, and concentrated disclosure. Tailoring lives only in the (tailored) fields; the (locked) block is inherited.

value_prop_ref.description: Section in 'Tailored Value Propositions v2', e.g. '2.4.1 Channels · Mediators'.

coverage.description: Honest-coverage status (array, so compound canon like Live/Roadmap is representable); drives coverage tags + disclosure. Utility pages = ["Live"].

taxonomy.description: The canonical three-door taxonomy + three-tier context. This replaces the loose 'axes'.

door.description: Which of the three doors (or Master/Technology top-level) this surface sits behind.

context_tier2.description: The middle-layer context block this surface INHERITS (§3.1 Markets / §3.2 Channels / direct-to-master).

channel.description: The five canonical channels (Value-Props §3.2). 'n/a' for Markets/Master surfaces (no channel door).

solution.description: Matter type × jurisdiction (Solutions door / any surface's covered matter).

org_lifecycle.description: TRUE for organization surfaces (Businesses, Sponsoring Orgs, Government) — carry Prevent → Resolve → Improve as first-class substance (§3.3).

locked.description: INHERITED — never edited per surface. Asserted so the renderer + QA gate can enforce.

master_promise_source.const: Value Props v2 Part 2 — say it once, everywhere

copy.description: (tailored) Claude-generated to the CANONICAL value-prop structure. Keep the sell pure; concentrate disclosure (§1.3).

hero_title.description: The surface's headline (its Lead, said as a title).

lead.description: Tier 3 — the surface's own audience, pain, and value (the entry point).

substance.description: The verifiable value spine; for org surfaces, the Prevent→Resolve→Improve lifecycle.

tier2_frame.description: The inherited Markets or Channels context line. OMIT for Master/Home/Solutions/Technology (they carry the master promise directly).

master_promise.description: Tier 1 — the close: both sides see the same honest picture and resolve on the facts. Truth · Fairness · Efficiency.

the_ask.description: The single CTA for this surface (e.g. 'Become a founding partner').

proof_points.description: Verifiable proofs; mark any unverified figure [verify].

coverage_tags.description: Per §1.3 place 3 — tag any capability not live today (Live / Gated / Roadmap / Specified).

example_matter.description: SYNTHETIC worked example. Never real data.

disclosure_block.description: The CONCENTRATED legal layer (§1.3 / Part 5) — three defined places only, never sprinkled in the sell.

standing_line.const: AI-assisted overviews · figures illustrative · not legal advice.

keeps_this_honest.description: The per-surface 'How JusticeX keeps this honest' block — objective-comparison/software-not-a-forum, live-vs-roadmap, no-advice/no-prediction/no-settlement.

coverage_statement.description: What is live vs gated vs roadmap for THIS surface.

media.description: Full four-asset pack on every content surface (Gregg, Jul 16). Briefs DERIVED from copy. video_owner prevents duplicate videos.

video_owner.description: Exactly one owner for this surface's explanatory/produced video. Never both.

gemini_notebook_brief.description: The explanatory, source-grounded pack. Gemini Notebook (formerly NotebookLM; renamed 2026-07-16, Studio generators unchanged, model Gemini 3.5).

assets.description: Full four-asset pack for content surfaces.

source_docs.description: Grounding sources (value-props v2, positioning canon, surface copy). Synthetic only.

studio_defaults.const: Audio=Brief/Shorter · Video=Brief ~60–90s/Classic+custom palette · Infographic=orientation+Standard · Deck=Presenter ~8 slides PDF+PPTX

disclosure_line.const: AI-assisted overviews · figures illustrative · not legal advice.

higgsfield_brief.description: The visual & cinematic layer — marketing site only; no user data. Soul ID / style kit locks the look.

negative_constraints.const: no fabricated human faces; no scales/gavel/courtroom; no stock handshakes; no off-palette

avatar.description: Real, CONSENTED likeness only (Synthesia/HeyGen), or voice-only. Never Higgsfield-fabricated, never a cartoon.

disclosure.const: AI-assisted presenter — shown at first exposure (EU AI Act Art. 50).

counsel_gate.description: Required for Gated/Roadmap surfaces before public wiring.
